name: Pity This Busy Monster
short_description: Fulfill orders at the world's least efficient donut factory in this first-person physics-based play. Spanky’s welcomes you as a valued member of our family.
detailed_description:
Pity This Busy Monster is a physics-based narrative game where you experience employment at Spanky’s Donut Fulfillment Warehouse, the least efficient donut factory in the world.

Fulfill orders by throwing the correct donuts into boxes, keep your work area clean, and unwind after work.

Everything happens for a reason.

Playable in a single sitting, a 60 to 90 minute experience. 

Welcome to Spanky’s™

We’re thrilled to have you join us as a valued team member. You’ll be heading up our Donut Department as one of our highly valued 8,0129,839 employees.

Fulfill the donut orders, 6 per box in the customers’ requested flavors and preferred sprinkle accoutrement.

Throwing donuts is encouraged– just be careful to avoid dropping the icing side on the floor.  

Enjoy the luxury your very own employee lodging, complete with Relaxation Station, coffee maker, vending machine, and 50” flat screen.

We aim to please. That’s why we believe you’ll be satisfied with your existence with us here at Spanky’s. ♥
